hero.title: Your Trusted Partner in Construction and Engineering Consulting
hero.subtitle: At Saelacons, we bring your projects to life with the highest quality standards. We are by your side with our international experience and expert team.

home.servicesSubtitle: We offer a wide range of professional consulting services

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Saelacons — Trusted Engineering Consultancy
about.description: Saelacons is a firm that provides consulting services in the construction and engineering sector at international standards. With our experienced team of engineers, we are with you at every stage of your projects.
about.missionText: To bring our clients' projects to life with the highest standards of quality, safety, and sustainability.
about.visionText: To become a leading firm in the international arena of construction consultancy and to offer innovative solutions to the industry.

valuesList.qualityText: We aim for the highest standards in every project.
valuesList.trustText: We build trust with transparent and honest business processes.
valuesList.innovationText: We make a difference with modern technology and methods.
valuesList.sustainabilityText: We create environmentally conscious, future-oriented solutions.

projectManagement.title: Project Management
projectManagement.description: We professionally manage all processes of your projects from start to completion.

structuralEngineering.title: Structural Engineering
structuralEngineering.description: We offer detailed structural analysis and design services for safe and durable structures.

qualityControl.title: Quality Control
qualityControl.description: We provide quality control and inspection services compliant with international standards.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting
consulting.description: We provide comprehensive technical consulting and feasibility studies for your construction projects.

supervision.title: Site Supervision
supervision.description: We supervise construction site processes for compliance with safety and quality standards.

design.title: Design Services
design.description: We offer modern and functional architectural and engineering design solutions.

project1.title: Residential Complex
project1.description: Project management and supervision of a modern 500-unit residential complex.

project2.title: Shopping Center
project2.description: Structural engineering consultancy for a 30,000 m² enclosed shopping center.

project3.title: Industrial Facility
project3.description: Quality control and inspection service for an international standards industrial facility.

project4.title: Infrastructure Project
project4.description: Technical consulting service for urban infrastructure renovation project.
